summary: Completed the V1 local-only approved skill activation workflow: review-derived eval cases can feed a candidate skill, explicit human approval activates it as an approved matter-scoped playbook skill, and the activation writes an auditable local event.
risks: The activation workflow is local-only and matter-scoped; it does not implement a production/global skill registry.
Supabase eval/skill persistence intentionally remains unavailable for V1 local-only.
Real-provider eval loops and pricing/provider adapters remain outside this local workflow.
needs: Keep production/Supabase/global governance work separate from V1 local-only acceptance.
Future UI wiring can call the approved skill activation route from Eval Workbench without changing the backend approval invariant.
